name: Soccer Mommy
description:
'''Sophia Regina Allison''' (born May 27, 1997), better known by her stage name '''Soccer Mommy''', is a Swiss-born American [[indie rock]] singer-songwriter from [[Nashville, Tennessee]]. She has four studio albums to her name; her latest album, ''[[Evergreen (Soccer Mommy album)|Evergreen]]'', was released on October 25, 2024.

Her stage name was derived from her [[Twitter handle]]. Throughout her career, she has toured with bands and artists including [[Stephen Malkmus and the Jicks|Stephen Malkmus]], [[Mitski]], [[Kacey Musgraves]], [[Slowdive]], [[Jay Som]], [[Frankie Cosmos]], [[Phoebe Bridgers]], [[Snail Mail (musician)|Snail Mail]], [[Paramore]], [[Liz Phair]], and [[Vampire Weekend]].
